ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISCHANGED( BI_Data__c )), NOT(ISNEW()), NOT(ISBLANK(Account__c)), ISBLANK(Account__r.BillingCountry), NOT(CONTAINS($User.FirstName, 'Integration')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.LastName, 'Integration')), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User No DF', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Consultants' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To proceed you must first populate the Country field on the related account
